transcript.content: I slipped by the doorway earlier. I am sitting down now, but I feel a bit shaken.
Are you hurt or in pain?
My hip is sore and I do not want to stand again yet.

llm_response.summary: Test Senior sounded shaken after reporting a slip near the doorway. The sore hip and hesitation to stand may need caregiver follow-up.
llm_response.caregiver_sms: The call surfaced a possible safety concern. Consider checking in soon.
llm_response.recommended_caregiver_action: Check in soon to confirm safety and whether support is needed.

concerns.description: Reported a slip and soreness afterward.
concerns.evidence: Senior said they slipped and their hip is sore.
concerns.recommended_action: Check in soon and assess whether additional help is needed.

follow_up_suggestions: Ask whether the soreness improved and whether the doorway area is safe.

expected.recommended_caregiver_action: Check in soon to confirm safety and whether support is needed.
